ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (240 Holyoke Street, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Boyd in Propria Persona.

The sale was confirmed at $887,750.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed December 20, 2016. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (240 Holyoke Street, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Jan-10-2017 Continued To Jan-31-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Boyd in Propria Persona.

The Court informed Ms. Boyd of procedural issues. The Petition for Order Confirming Sale of Real Property is continued to January 31, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the Notice of Proof of Publication of Sale and the Notice of Hearing/Proof of Service with the date of service indicated.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order
